questions.solution: The correct option that has to be filled in the given blank is "have run" as two people are mentioned in the sentence.

questions.question_text: I ________ we should accept the offer.
questions.solution: As the sentence is in present tense, so 'think' is the correct option.

questions.question_text: Neither he nor his servant ________.
questions.solution: When two subjects are connected by either or, neither ... nor, not only....but also the verb is used according to the subject that is closest to the verb (Here his servant).

questions.question_text: Many a girl ________ the movie.
questions.solution: Many a girl has seen the movie.

questions.question_text: Either you or she ________ this.
questions.solution: Either you or she has done this.

questions.question_text: You ________ introduce yourself, he might not remember you.
questions.solution: You should introduce yourself, he might not remember you.

questions.question_text:
Choose the correct form of modal auxiliary verb for the given sentence:
We have finished our work for today ________ we leave now?
questions.solution: We have finished our work for today may we leave now?

questions.question_text:
Choose the correct form of model auxiliary verb for the given sentence:
I have to work hard. I ________ pass this time.
questions.solution: I have to work hard. I must pass this time.

questions.question_text:
Choose the correct form of verb for the given sentence:
I ________ my friend to lend me his caravan for my trip to the country.
questions.solution: I persuaded my friend to lend me his caravan for my trip to the country.
